title: BreweryNG
description: BreweryNG is a plugin that adds an alternate brewing system which more closely resembles real-life drink production. It also lets you make alcoholic beverages and get drunk!
body:
BreweryNG is a plugin adding an alternate brewing system to Minecraft, supplementing the brewing stand-based system with new processes that resemble real-world brewing. This plugin is a fork of Brewery (rest in rip), so if you want support for older versions of Minecraft, check that out! BreweryNG is all about being the next generation of the ideas that Brewery presented.

Features:
- completely customizable recipes: offer your player tens or hundreds (or even thousands) of unique custom recipes exclusively for your server, for fun, advantage, or both!
- drunkenness as a new type of buff: affects movement, chat (configurable), and you might even wake up away from home if you pass out drunk (configurable)!
- let players explore recipes with a sense of intuition rather than a magical recipe book spoiling all secrets
